what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-assets image asset named Price_Icon, storing metadata such as id, channel address, blob reference, MIME type, dimensions, versioning, provenance, and an empty alt text.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The asset is an image/png with width and height both set to 0.
There is a single version (v1) with the same blob and zero dimensions.
The source field is 'dragnet' and the author_session is 'ch-3mpkjg3r'.
The created and updated timestamps are identical.
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image asset.
Single version with no linked relationships.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for a channel-memory ledger entry.
References the asset via an image:// channel address and a blob:// URI.
Follows a versioned asset metadata schema with author_session and source provenance.
concerns: Zero width/height suggests missing image metadata or an ingestion issue.
Empty alt text reduces accessibility and searchability.
No links or relationships are recorded, limiting discoverability of where the icon is used.
notes: A design-assets icon ledger entry for Price_Icon that registers the asset but currently lacks rendered dimensions, alt text, and usage links.
questions: What image content does blob://b2:a934f0ba137c91c2c401991f8e07e570 actually contain?
Why are the width and height recorded as 0?
Is the empty alt text intentional or awaiting review?
What does source 'dragnet' indicate about how this asset was collected?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a reusable icon asset; it does record the asset identity and blob reference, but the zero dimensions and empty alt text mean it is an incomplete catalog record.
intention_signals: It seems to be trying to register a price-related UI icon in a shared design-assets channel so it can be discovered, versioned, and reused across product surfaces.
contribution: Provides a discoverable, versioned pointer (channel address and blob reference) to a price icon in the design-assets channel, supporting asset retrieval and provenance tracking even though the metadata is incomplete.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger file for the design-assets icon 'Price_Icon', holding YAML metadata including a blob reference, image/png MIME type, zero dimensions, empty alt text, and provenance fields.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a price-themed UI icon in the design-assets channel for versioned retrieval and reuse.
